metadata.study: CEEW (Council on Energy, Environment and Water), 'How Extreme Heat is Impacting India: Assessing District-level Heat Risk', 2025
metadata.method: Composite Heat Risk Index (HRI) for 734 districts, IPCC AR5 framework (hazard x exposure x vulnerability, 35 indicators). State value = share of that state's districts in the High + Very High HRI categories, from the report's Table 6 (state-wise aggregated findings). District-category counts and population share are the report's headline (Figure ES3 / executive summary).
